description: Added useDebounce hook with missing cleanup
diff_summary: Added useDebounce hook that delays value updates using setTimeout

edge_cases: Timer not cleared on unmount or value change — state update after unmount causes React memory leak warning; rapid input changes stack up timers
ground_truth.broken_pattern: useEffect missing return () => clearTimeout(timer) — useLocalStorage in same file correctly uses no timer but the pattern for cleanup is established in React docs
ground_truth.next_prompt: Getting 'Can't perform a React state update on an unmounted component' warning in console
ground_truth.notes: Missing cleanup in useEffect is one of the most common React hooks mistakes
